uplink.description: Climate measurements frame: 23.0 C, 50 %RH, battery 3.10 V (temp+humidity bitmask 0x03)
uplink._note: synthetic in-bounds input; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (opcode 3, meas 0x03): temp int16/10, rh uint8, voltage uint16/100 -> battery. temp->air.temperature, rh->air.relativeHumidity

uplink.description: Full air-quality frame: 22.5 C, 45 %RH, 1020.2 hPa, 300 lux, 600 ppm CO2, 250 ppb TVOC, PM 10/15/20 ug/m3, battery 3.30 V
uplink._note: synthetic in-bounds input; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (opcode 3, meas 0xBF = temp|rh|press|light|co2|tvoc|ext, ext 0x02 = PM). press uint16/10, light/co2/tvoc/pm uint16. co2->air.co2 (air-quality), press->air.pressure, light->air.lightIntensity; tvoc/pm size bins -> camelCase extras

uplink.description: Sub-zero temperature only: -5.0 C, battery 3.30 V (two's-complement int16)
uplink._note: synthetic in-bounds input; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (opcode 3, meas 0x01): raw 0xFFCE = -50 -> -5.0 C confirms signed int16 / 10

uplink.description: Truncated CO2 field: measurement bitmask declares CO2 (0x10) but no bytes follow
uplink._note: synthetic in-bounds input; upstream reports error code 130 'Unexpected end, measurements without (complete) CO2 value' for the same truncation; this codec surfaces it as an error result rather than partial data

uplink.description: Unsupported opcode (99): only the Measurements opcode (3) is decoded for this air-quality sensor
uplink._note: synthetic in-bounds input; upstream reports error code 30 'Unknown OpCode' (99 is not a defined opcode); this codec rejects any non-Measurements opcode
